task_completion.description: Verify the 'Product Page View' goal is created with the correct URL pattern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Goals list or goal configuration screen, look for a goal named 'Product Page View' configured to trigger when the URL 'contains' the pattern '/products/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Add to Cart' goal is created with the correct URL pattern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Goals list or goal configuration screen, look for a goal named 'Add to Cart' configured to trigger when the URL 'contains' the pattern '/cart/add'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Checkout Started' goal is created with the correct URL pattern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Goals list or goal configuration screen, look for a goal named 'Checkout Started' configured to trigger when the URL 'contains' the pattern '/checkout'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Purchase Confirmation' goal is created with the correct URL pattern and match type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Goals list or goal configuration screen, look for a goal named 'Purchase Confirmation' configured to trigger when the URL 'is exactly' (or exact match) the pattern '/order/thank-you'.

task_completion.description: Verify all 4 goals are present in the Matomo instance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Matomo 'Manage Goals' page shows all 4 of the specified goals ('Product Page View', 'Add to Cart', 'Checkout Started', 'Purchase Confirmation') listed together.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Matomo GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Matomo interface loaded, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Matomo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly the Matomo analytics dashboard and not a text editor, mocked HTML page, or the funnel_spec.txt file being edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The task requires creating 4 specific goals in Matomo for the 'SportsFit Shop' website:
1. 'Product Page View': URL contains '/products/'
2. 'Add to Cart': URL contains '/cart/add'
3. 'Checkout Started': URL contains '/checkout'
4. 'Purchase Confirmation': URL exactly matches '/order/thank-you'
Check the Matomo 'Manage Goals' page or individual goal configuration screens to verify the names, match attributes (URL), pattern types (contains vs exact match), and patterns.
